content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are precisely matched to the live reads and follow Joe's coaching path with exceptional timing. When the client opens with intellectualized blankness, the coach bypasses the story with 'what's the real question?' (T2) — a find-the-want move. When the client can't name the feared emotion (T7), the coach calibrates the threshold downward: not 'feel it,' just 'name it,' then just 'give me the sound' (T8, T10) — three graduated steps, each earned. The somatic read in T10 ('does this feel like freeze?') names the state without pathologizing. The master move comes at T12: paradoxical instruction to go MORE blank, honoring the survival strategy rather than fighting it. Then the body is brought in WITHOUT leaving the quiet place (T14) — a both/and move. The safety check at T16 is genuine and non-script, doesn't break presence, and the coach apologizes and returns to the thread (T18). Self-disclosure at T26 normalizes without taking over, and immediately returns to her body. The closing reframe at T30 integrates: blank space stays, tears help the body. Sequence integrity is exemplary: regulation (welcoming blank) → feeling (sound, tears) → integration. No prescriptions, only experiments and invitations.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 26, 30],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Bypasses intellectual frame with 'what's the real question?' — find-the-want move at the right opening moment."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes compartmentalization as wisdom (matriarch concept) — validates rather than tries to dismantle."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Direct what-are-you-scared-of-feeling question, with attentive read of the smile."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Calibrates threshold down when 'feel it' doesn't land — pivots to 'name it' then 'sound' rather than repeating."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the somatic freeze explicitly — perceptual accuracy without pathology."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical instruction to go MORE blank — the master move, honoring the survival strategy."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brings body in while staying in quiet place — both/and integration move."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Genuine safety inquiry without breaking presence or shifting to clinical mode."},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Returns to the thread after the safety check without losing the arc."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Finds the voice/fear behind the want to cry — apply-view-to-the-voice timing."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Self-disclosure to normalize, then immediately returns to her body: 'what happened when I said that?'"},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Integration reframe holds both: blank space AND tears coexist — earned only because previous moves landed."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "calibrate-the-threshold", "joy-as-matriarch", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "feel-your-way-to-freedom", "what-are-you-scared-of-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Textbook example of move-to-read matching and sequence integrity. Each move is earned by the previous one."
}
